mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE()) AS todayOrderCount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(payable_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE() AND order_status IN ('TO_SHIP', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED')) AS todayPayAmount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM orders WHERE order_status = 'TO_SHIP') AS toShipCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM inventory WHERE available_stock < 10) AS lowStockCount

SELECT oi.sku_id AS skuId, oi.sku_title AS skuTitle, SUM(oi.quantity) AS soldQuantity FROM order_item oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_no = oi.order_no WHERE o.order_status IN ('TO_SHIP', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') GROUP BY oi.sku_id, oi.sku_title ORDER BY soldQuantity DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT sku_id AS skuId, available_stock AS availableStock, 10 AS thresholdStock FROM inventory WHERE available_stock < 10 ORDER BY available_stock ASC
